headline: 3M Expands Safety Focus With Bain Joint Venture In Fire Rescue
summary: 3M (NYSE:MMM) has formed a joint venture with Bain Capital that combines its Scott Safety business with Madison Fire & Rescue. The new venture is focused on safety and fire rescue equipment and solutions for first responders and industrial workers. The partnership establishes a larger platform in protective gear and related technologies across multiple end markets. For you as an investor, this move highlights how 3M is reshaping its portfolio around safety and protection, an area closely...
